title: ついに集まったチームメンバー！

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
To start you off, I've prepared a clubroom for you
all.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I only managed to secure the basic
necessities. There isn't even enough training
equipment in there yet...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But as you increase your ranking by securing
victories in the Unity Cup, I'm sure we can find
some funds to improve it!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And those upgrades will in turn help your team to
train harder and more efficiently—I'm sure of it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You'll have to work diligently in the Unity Cup for
your team's sake, so best of luck!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
All right, then! Let's get you signed up for the
Unity Cup straight away.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Here's the registration paperwork. Please fill it
out and submit it when you can.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'll be rooting for your success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a blank space on the form to write our
team name. Perhaps "Team Carrot" would be a
good choice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fill in our name on the form as "Team Carrot."
That makes it official!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to work with my team and show
everyone what we can do!
